description: Per-window tick phase measurements from overlapping matched filter. Each row is one 5-second composite correlation window (1-second step), providing ~55 phase samples per minute per station. The phase_rad field tracks carrier phase evolution across the minute, revealing ionospheric dynamics: drift (Doppler), jumps (mode changes), and scintillation (irregularities).
standards: ITU-R TF.460-6 Standard-frequency and time-signal emissions
reference: Quadrature correlation phase extraction from per-second timing ticks

fields.name: minute_boundary_utc
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary

fields.name: window_start_second
fields.description: First second of the correlation window (1-57 typical)

fields.name: window_end_second
fields.description: Last second of the correlation window (exclusive)

fields.name: window_center_second
fields.description: Center time of window in seconds from minute boundary

fields.name: phase_rad
fields.description: Audio-domain modulation phase (radians, from atan2 of AM envelope quadrature correlator)

fields.name: carrier_phase_rad
fields.description: RF carrier phase at tone frequency (radians, from IQ mix-down and coherent averaging). Tracks ionospheric path length changes.

fields.name: dc_carrier_phase_rad
fields.description: Bare carrier phase from mean(IQ) DC phasor (radians). Unambiguous on single-station channels (CHU 3.33/7.85/14.67, WWV 20/25 MHz). On shared channels this is a mix of carriers.

fields.name: timing_offset_ms
fields.description: Timing offset from expected tick position (ms)

fields.name: timing_uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Estimated timing uncertainty based on SNR (ms)

fields.name: valid_ticks
fields.description: Number of ticks in this window that contributed to the composite template

fields.name: processed_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when record was written
